# name|eps|a_shell|a_holes|b_shell|b_holes|mode
# Experimental extreme-scale diagnostics for frontier robustness tracking.
# These cases are intentionally harder than the standard conformance corpus.

extreme_large_shifted_overlap|1e-8|1000000000000:1000000000000:1000001000000:1000001000000|-|1000000000500:999999999500:1000001000500:1000000999500|-|relaxed
extreme_large_thin_vertical_slice|1e-8|1000000000000:1000000000000:1000001000000:1000001000000|-|1000000500000:999999990000:1000000500002:1000001010000|-|relaxed
extreme_large_hole_boundary_proximity|1e-8|1000000000000:1000000000000:1000001000000:1000001000000|1000000400000:1000000400000:1000000600000:1000000600000|1000000600000:1000000499999.5:1000000800000:1000000500000.5|-|relaxed
extreme_mixed_scale_small_delta|1e-9|1000000000000:1000000000000:1000001000000:1000001000000|-|poly:1000000000000:1000000000000.0001,1000000500000:1000000000000.0002,1000001000000:1000000000000.0001,1000001000000:1000001000000,1000000000000:1000001000000|-|relaxed
